types:type.name: News
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type News = {| News_Content__c: String, CreatedById: String, CreatedDate: String, Location__c: String, Urgent__c: String |} {"example": "{\\\"News_Content__c\\\":\\\"Lake Road is closed due to mudslides.\\\",\\\"CreatedById\\\":\\\"005g5000000n0ZxAAI\\\",\\\"CreatedDate\\\":\\\"2026-03-09T19:27:32.431Z\\\",\\\"Location__c\\\":\\\"Mountain City\\\",\\\"Urgent__c\\\":\\\"true\\\"}"}
